basic_details.job_title: DLSA Sheopur Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Sheopur (DLSA Sheopur) Vehicle Driver Notification 2026 has been released on 09 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Sheopur Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, Valid Driving License, Driving Experience
qualification.details: Vehicle Driver: 10th pass from any recognized board. Valid driving license and experience of driving all types of vehicles. Preference to qualified mechanics.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Sheopur Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Sheopur Vehicle Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the DLSA Sheopur Vehicle Driver recruitment is 15 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th grade from a recognized board and possess a valid driving license with experience in driving all types of vehicles. Preference will be given to qualified mechanics.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Vehicle Driver position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Vehicle Driver post will receive a salary of Rs. 12,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Vehicle Driver post is 18 years. No upper age limit is specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DLSA Sheopur Vehicle Driver job?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You should download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Vehicle Driver role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Driving Test followed by an Interview to assess the candidates' suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity with the District Legal Services Authority Sheopur.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is स्थापना/607/जिविसप्रा/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the District Legal Services Authority Sheopur located?
faq.answer: The District Legal Services Authority Sheopur is located in Sheopur, Madhya Pradesh.
